response.justification: Bogdan has a solid 14+ year polyglot engineering career with genuine depth in high-throughput microservices and full-stack development, but the resume shows no evidence of the core competencies this role demands: experimentation framework design, A/B testing infrastructure, feature flagging systems, telemetry/metrics platform engineering, or statistical analysis for rollout risk. The role is IC6 Principal with a mandate to own cross-team experimentation platforms; the candidate's scope of impact, while respectable, remains at the individual contributor product-team level with no indication of multi-team systemic influence or growth engineering ownership.
strengths: Demonstrated high-throughput distributed systems experience at Dunnhumby, handling millions of HTTP requests per second with low-latency async I/O
Broad polyglot background (JavaScript/TypeScript, Java, C#, C++, DLang) covering several of the required languages
Track record of open-source platform ownership and technical community involvement, suggesting engineering depth beyond day-to-day product work
concerns: No experimentation platform, A/B testing, feature flagging, or rollout-risk management experience anywhere in the resume
No telemetry infrastructure, metrics systems, or experimental analysis work — foundational requirements for the role
No evidence of cross-team technical leadership, stakeholder alignment, or systemic platform-building at the scale an IC6 Principal role demands

key_factors.factor: No Telemetry or Metrics Infrastructure Work
